programmes.show_description: Life On The Lake. Gil and his family are living an idyllic existence until an accident changes everything. Just as Gill seems to have moved on, someone close hatches a deadly plot. S7, Ep17
Safe At Home. After years of searching for love, Doris thinks she's finally hit the jackpot with an old friend named Mark. But something dark is taking hold of their marriage. S7, Ep18
The White Cellphone. In 2014, graduate student Tequila Suter is stabbed to death in her suburban Buffalo home. Investigators piece together a video trail of her murder. S7, Ep17
He's Dead, That's How I Feel. A bizarre traffic accident takes the life of a teenager. With the driver vanished, police turn to surveillance video and make a sinister discovery. S7, Ep18

From the Ashes. See how arson investigators gather physical evidence and mount undercover and sting operations to crack insurance torchings and arson murders. S2, Ep9
Lasting Impressions. No matter how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit often leaves something behind. Even a fingerprint or shoe tread can lead to a conviction. S3, Ep3
Manhunt. The prime suspect in a murder is caught robbing a bank before being sentenced to life. His subsequent prison escape leads to a huge FBI manhunt. S3, Ep15
No Remorse. Explore the mystery behind the body of a drug courier found burning in an alley. The FBI capture a drug lord who uses violence to keep people quiet. S3, Ep17
Birmingham Shooting And Shoe Detective. Judge Rinder examines a shooting that left two young girls fighting for their lives and a criminal who left behind a clue to his identity. S3, Ep2
Two's Company, Three Is Murder. Linda Singleton's life seemed perfect. But under the veneer she was engaged in a love triangle that turned deadly when her secret affair was exposed. S3, Ep6
Disappearance In The Desert. Daniel Robinson arrives at his work site in the Arizona desert. A co-worker claims he was acting strangely before leaving in the middle of his shift. S10, Ep3

Steve Wright: The Suffolk Strangler. Detectives recount the investigation into the serial killer Steve Wright. How did they catch the notorious murderer who killed five women? S1, Ep3
I Saw Dad Kill Mom. Five-year-old Audrey witnesses her mother, Diane, brutally stabbed to death. To Audrey's horror, her mother's murderer is somebody very close to home. S10, Ep3
Tempest. After a violent knife attack results in a man's death, his wife claims she was the victim of an abusive relationship. His phone will reveal the truth. S10, Ep5

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: Crimson Snow. In California, police find an accomplished U.S. Forest Service worker beneath a mound of snow. A multi-state manhunt for a deranged killer ensues. S3, Ep6
Double Tragedy And Grace Banks. Judge Rinder examines the murder case of a girl whose younger sister was also dying of terminal cancer. Then, he looks into a gang of puppy traders. S3, Ep3
Cold Feet. A 24-year-old Yale student goes missing several days before her wedding. Can security camera footage help detectives hunt down the person responsible? S6, Ep4
Jimmy Haakenson. Detective Jason Moran re-opens the case of serial killer John Wayne Gacy. The grieving family of Jimmy Haakenson, missing for 40 years, wonder if he was a victim. S1, Ep3

It Was All Of Them. Divorced mum Krystal is delighted when she marries single dad Nathan. Little does she know, her blended family will soon turn into a nightmare. S7, Ep19
Put Yourself Out There. Randy Ferguson's life changes forever when he meets single mother, Angela Phillips. But the beautiful life they build together hides an ugly secret. S7, Ep20
The Rent Check. When an Army veteran vanishes from her apartment, investigators devise a unique surveillance strategy to find her. They uncover disturbing evidence. S7, Ep19
Hustle Mart Murders. Three family members working at a North Carolina convenience store fall victim to a brutal crime. Detectives examine the killers' video trail. S7, Ep20

Women Who Kill. A chilling look at the work of female killers. They can be as deadly as their male counterparts, but they choose less violent methods. S3, Ep8
A Taste of Poison. Poisoners: devious killers relying on their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. Find out why they don't usually stop at just one kill. S3, Ep9
Hidden Agenda. The FBI is hot on the trail of bank robbers who leave behind bombs after their crime, but there's more to their cause than meets the eye. S4, Ep2
Vanished. When the wife of a wealthy man vanished, an unusual ransom note provided clues to the captor - who turned out to be involved in one of his companies. S4, Ep5

Prescription For Murder. After church-going mother, Marilyn Reza, is found dead in her home, officers suspect parishioners. A secret confession at her funeral reveals the killer. S3, Ep7
